pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. It’s a bit surreal being in here with so much on the line, isn’t it? What’s your name, and how are you holding up?
Hey H, I'm B. It definitely feels weird being here, but I'm holding up alright—just really focused on what's at stake. How about you?
I’m feeling the pressure, honestly. I’ve got people back home counting on me, so I’m pretty locked in. Have you thought about what you’d do with the money if you won?
I’d use it to take care of my family and get things on track for us; that’s my main motivation. What about you, what’s your plan?
Pretty much the same—I want to set up a solid foundation for my family so they don't have to stress about the future anymore.
I respect that. It makes the stakes feel even higher when it’s for them, doesn’t it?
It really does. It adds a lot of pressure, but it’s also the best motivation I could ask for.
Exactly. It’s good to know I'm not the only one here with that kind of drive.
Agreed. It makes it feel a bit better knowing there are others here for the right reasons. Best of luck to both of us.
Thanks, H. I appreciate that. Let's hope we both find a way to make it happen for our families. Good luck.
Definitely. Let's do our best for them. See you around!

post_game.message: Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
Thank you for your cooperation. It was a pleasure to see everyone get an equal amount.
I agree. It was a successful outcome for both of us.
